title: Enable MFA for IAM Users
console_steps: 7. Scan QR code with authenticator app
cli_example: aws iam create-virtual-mfa-device --virtual-mfa-device-name user-mfa --outfile /tmp/QRCode.png --bootstrap-method QRCodePNG && aws iam enable-mfa-device --user-name jdoe --serial-number arn:aws:iam::123456789012:mfa/user-mfa --authentication-code1 123456 --authentication-code2 789012

references.title: Ensure MFA is enabled for all IAM users with console access

rollback_difficulty: Easy — MFA can be deactivated per user
